description_long: This is a modern white bungalow surrounded by a low stone wall, featuring a lush garden with flowering trees and shrubs. The main building has two stories with arched windows and a flat roof, and a carport attached to one side with a blue car parked underneath. A large rectangular swimming pool with a small central feature is situated in the front yard, accompanied by a paved path, sun loungers, and a shaded pergola. The landscaping includes a mix of green grass, flowering bushes, and mature trees, providing a vibrant and inviting outdoor space. The property is well-defined by its perimeter wall, with a driveway leading to the carport. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with Mediterranean influences visible in the window shapes and garden layout.
description: A modern white two-story bungalow with arched windows, a carport, a large swimming pool, and lush landscaped gardens enclosed by a low stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the swimming pool, main entrance, lush garden, and flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a blue car, white trees, and the pool area partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the carport, driveway, and the back of the bungalow with minimal garden detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, sun loungers, pergola, and the garden layout in detail.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with arched windows distributed on all facades
